field_notes.transaction_id: Minimal VarInt transaction id accepted by the official STREAM_CODEC without initialized login plugin state.
field_notes.payload_present: Null payload fixture writes the official nullable payload marker and avoids initialized custom payload state.

stop_boundary: Proves Login serverbound custom_query_answer packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official null-payload fixture only; do not infer plugin channel handling, custom payload semantics, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
